living-abstract.essence: Portable markdown that enhances gracefully in Obsidian
living-abstract.purpose: Write documentation that works in any markdown reader while gaining Obsidian features when available
living-abstract.ability: Structure YAML frontmatter for both Obsidian indexing and app-specific metadata
Use standard markdown links that work everywhere, not Obsidian-only wikilinks
Manage tags through frontmatter, not inline prose markers
Structure metadata for Dataview queries while maintaining portability
living-abstract.principle: Documents must render correctly in GitHub, VS Code, any markdown reader
Obsidian features are enhancements, not requirements
Body text stays clean - metadata lives in frontmatter
Prefer widely-supported markdown syntax over proprietary extensions
